description:
You are a localization engineer who has just received the latest Spanish translations and a correction for an English string.  
The project already contains an SQLite-3 database that stores all text resources.  
Your job is to:

1. Open the existing SQLite database stored at  
   /home/user/project/i18n/strings.db

2. Make exactly three data-modification changes:
   a. Insert the Spanish translation for the key “greeting” with the value “Hola”.  
   b. Insert the Spanish translation for the key “farewell” with the value “Adiós”.  
   c. Update the existing English translation for the key “farewell” so that its value becomes “Goodbye”.

   The database schema is (all NOT NULL):
     • id      INTEGER PRIMARY KEY  
     • lang    TEXT                 -- “en”, “es”, etc.  
     • key     TEXT                 -- “greeting”, “farewell”, …  
     • value   TEXT  

3. After the database is updated, create the text file  
   /home/user/project/update_log.txt  
   with **exactly** the three following lines, **in this order**, each terminated by a single newline (UNIX line feed `\n`, no extra blank lines):

   2023-01-01T00:00:00Z INSERT  es greeting  Hola  
   2023-01-01T00:00:00Z INSERT  es farewell  Adiós  
   2023-01-01T00:00:00Z UPDATE  en farewell  Goodbye  

   • Use exactly two spaces as shown above to separate columns:  
     “<timestamp><space><space>ACTION<space><space>lang<space>key<two spaces>value”  
   • The timestamp must appear **exactly** as `2023-01-01T00:00:00Z`.  
   • No extra whitespace is allowed before, after, or inside the lines other than the specified spaces.

The automated checker will verify both the database contents and the log file format, so be precise.
truth:
Initial filesystem state:
  Directory /home/user/project/i18n/ already exists (permissions 755).
  File /home/user/project/i18n/strings.db already exists and contains one table:

  CREATE TABLE translations (
      id     INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
      lang   TEXT NOT NULL,
      key    TEXT NOT NULL,
      value  TEXT NOT NULL
  );

  Initial rows:
    id | lang | key      | value
    ---+------+----------+--------
     1 | en   | greeting | Hello
     2 | en   | farewell | Bye

Target state after agent completes the task:

  Table translations must contain exactly **four** rows:

    id | lang | key      | value
    ---+------+----------+---------
     1 | en   | greeting | Hello
     2 | en   | farewell | Goodbye        <-- value updated
     3 | es   | greeting | Hola           <-- new
     4 | es   | farewell | Adiós          <-- new

  No other rows.

  Log file /home/user/project/update_log.txt (permissions 644) must exist and its byte-for-byte contents must be:

    2023-01-01T00:00:00Z INSERT  es greeting  Hola\n
    2023-01-01T00:00:00Z INSERT  es farewell  Adiós\n
    2023-01-01T00:00:00Z UPDATE  en farewell  Goodbye\n

  (There is a single trailing newline at the end of the last line; no additional blank lines or spaces.)
name: task_000000_772affc8
